projects.title: AI Diabetes Detection System
projects.description: Deep learning CNN for diabetic retinopathy screening — production-style training pipeline and competition-grade accuracy.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive deep learning solution for diabetes detection using Convolutional Neural Networks. The project involved data preprocessing, model architecture design, training, and validation. Achieved strong results in the Kufr El-Sheikh Olympics Competition.
projects.achievement: 2nd Place in Kufr El-Sheikh Olympics Competition
projects.challenge: Diabetic retinopathy is a leading cause of blindness, but early detection through manual examination is time-consuming and requires specialized expertise not always available.
projects.solution: Developed a robust CNN using Transfer Learning (ResNet50) with heavy data augmentation to address class imbalance. Achieved 94%+ accuracy on the test set, providing a quick, accessible screening workflow.
projects.impact: Demonstrated a deployable screening path for clinics with limited specialists — model performance and documentation suitable for stakeholder review and further clinical validation.

projects.title: Data Governance Platform (BUDG)
projects.description: Enterprise data governance and metadata management — closed-source production system for policy, lineage, and operational workflows.
projects.longDescription: Enterprise solution for managing data assets, metadata, and governance policies. Built for reliability and auditability with Java services, search-backed discovery, and integrations used by internal teams.
projects.challenge: Enterprise data was fragmented across systems with weak metadata and inconsistent policy enforcement, driving compliance risk and duplicated engineering effort.
projects.solution: Implemented governed metadata services, REST APIs, and search (Elasticsearch) over a normalized MySQL model; JWT/LDAP authentication, exports (Excel/PDF), and structured logging for operability.
projects.impact: Reduced time-to-answer for data stewards on lineage and ownership questions and tightened audit trails for sensitive domains — measured via fewer ad-hoc tickets and faster onboarding of new datasets.
highlights: Java 17 WAR on Tomcat with Jakarta Servlets
Elasticsearch for discovery and governance search
MySQL + HikariCP with JWT/LDAP security model
OpenAPI-described APIs, reporting exports, transactional email

projects.title: ML Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end ML analytics pipeline for validation, training hooks, and cloud-backed storage — built for repeatable deployments.
projects.longDescription: Analytics pipeline for large-scale processing and ML workflows with automated validation and deployment hooks across AWS and Azure.
projects.challenge: Teams lacked a repeatable path from validated datasets to deployed models, causing inconsistent metrics and slow releases.
projects.solution: Built Python ETL/orchestration with object storage on AWS S3 and Azure Blob, automated validation, and deployment scripts so models could be promoted with checks instead of manual handoffs.
projects.impact: Cut model promotion friction: deployment cycles shortened substantially and regressions were caught earlier via automated validation gates.
highlights: Python ETL with cloud object storage (S3 / Azure Blob)
Scikit-learn training with cross-validation and versioning
Deployment workflow tuned for faster iteration
